    • instance

      public static org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin instance

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      @NotNull public static @NotNull org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin getInstance()
      Returns:
      instance of plugin set via init(Plugin); never null.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if init(Plugin) has not been called yet (S-006).

    • getInstance

      @NotNull public static @NotNull org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin getInstance(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin fallback)
      Self-populating variant of getInstance(). If init(Plugin) has not been called yet, the supplied fallback is used to initialize the API (idempotent) and is then returned. Lets in-repo callers that already hold a Plugin reference (e.g. the RTP plugin instance) avoid the IllegalStateException thrown by the no-arg overload during early lifecycle windows, without effects-api having to take a hard dependency on RTP.
      Parameters:
      fallback - plugin to initialize with if instance is unset; may be null
      Returns:
      the resolved Plugin instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if instance is unset and fallback is null

    • getServerIntVersion

      public static Integer getServerIntVersion()

    • init

      public static void init(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin caller)

    • disable

      public static void disable()
      Plugin-disable hook. Caller is expected to invoke this from its onDisable() so still-gliding players can be placed at the highest safe block below them (or on a synthesized platform) before the server stops. Idempotent.
